title: autobench.gpu_job.v1
description: GPU shader execution job submitted to the autobench broker

job_id.description: Stable queue key for this job; the dedup/idempotency key used by the consumer-group queue and echoed back on the result.

correlation_id.description: Ties this job to a request/saga spanning multiple events; propagated unchanged to the gpu_result.

attempt.description: Zero-based retry attempt counter incremented on each requeue after a failure or timeout.

max_attempts.description: Maximum number of attempts before the job is dead-lettered.

source_island.description: Originating evolution island identifier (name or numeric index) for the funsearch/autobench population this job came from.
